description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling knowledge, focusing on serialization pitfalls, cross‑context instanceof issues, and nuanced try‑catch scenarios. It is positioned at a challenging, senior‑level difficulty with a confident, slightly tongue‑in‑cheek teaching tone. The content is designed to differentiate seasoned developers from less experienced ones.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization errors, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced try‑catch patterns, Debugging and diagnostics
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers, senior front‑end engineers, and developers preparing for senior‑level interviews who want to sharpen their error‑handling skills.
